Proof About
Request a Demo

How It Installs

Installed in 30 minutes. No process shutdown. No wiring changes.

SAM4 clips onto the electrical cabinet. It reads motor current from existing wiring. Your plant keeps running while we start monitoring.

< 30 min Per asset install time
0 Process shutdowns required
10,000+ Assets installed globally

What you don't need

Most condition monitoring systems demand sensor networks, gateway infrastructure, and weeks of commissioning. SAM4 skips all of that.

No vibration sensors
No accelerometers to mount, calibrate, or replace. ESA reads the motor current directly from the MCC.
No wireless gateways
No mesh networks, batteries, or signal-strength surveys. SAM4 connects over your existing Ethernet or 4G.
No process shutdowns
CTs clip around live cables inside the MCC. The asset keeps running. Production stays on schedule.

What you do need

Access to the MCC, a network drop, and 30 minutes per asset. That's the full requirements list.

MCC access
SAM4 current transformers clip around the supply cables inside your motor control centre. No modification to the existing wiring.
Network connection
One Ethernet port or 4G SIM per SAM4 Edge device. Data volumes are small. typically under 50 MB per asset per month.

What's in the box

Every SAM4 deployment ships as a self-contained kit. Your electrician needs nothing else.

  • SAM4 Edge device (DIN-rail mount)
  • Split-core current transformers (3-phase)
  • Ethernet cable (5 m)
  • 4G antenna and SIM (optional)
  • DIN-rail power supply (24 V DC)
  • Quick-start installation guide

One Edge device covers up to 5 assets. A single SAM4 Edge unit monitors up to 5 motors from the same MCC section. Fewer devices means fewer network drops and faster rollout.

Step-by-step installation

A qualified electrician completes the full install. No specialist tooling, no Samotics engineer required on site.

1
Mount the Edge device
Clip the SAM4 Edge onto the DIN rail inside the MCC panel. Connect the 24 V DC power supply.
3 min
2
Attach current transformers
Clip the split-core CTs around each phase conductor. No cable cutting, no terminal disconnection. The motor stays running.
5 min per asset
3
Connect the network
Plug in the Ethernet cable or insert the 4G SIM. The Edge device auto-registers with the SAM4 cloud.
2 min
4
Configure assets in SAM4
Map each CT channel to an asset in SAM4. Set nameplate data (kW, RPM, application). Done from any browser.
5 min per asset
5
Baseline and monitor
SAM4 builds a behavioural baseline over 2 weeks of normal operation. After that, the AI flags deviations automatically.
2 weeks (automatic)

From contract to coverage

Most deployments reach full monitoring within 6 weeks. Here's what that timeline looks like.

W1
Kick-off
Joint scoping call. Asset list confirmed. Network requirements shared. Hardware shipped.
W2-3
Installation
Your electrician mounts the Edge devices and CTs. We support remotely. Typical site: 50 assets in 2 days.
W3-4
Baselining
SAM4 learns normal operating behaviour. Our engineers verify signal quality and asset configuration.
W5-6
Live monitoring
Alerts flow to your team. CMMS integration active. Monthly reporting cadence starts.

After installation

SAM4 is a managed service, not a software licence. Our reliability engineers validate every alert before it reaches your team.

Engineer-validated alerts
Every alert goes through human review. You get actionable diagnostics, not raw data noise.
Monthly reporting
Asset health summaries, detection highlights, and fleet-level trends. Delivered to your inbox or CMMS.
Hardware maintenance
SAM4 Edge has no moving parts and no batteries to replace. If a device fails, we ship a replacement.

Scales with your operation

Start with one MCC. Expand to the full plant. Roll out across sites. The architecture doesn't change.

Multi-site from day one
SAM4's cloud architecture supports unlimited sites under one tenant. Fleet-level dashboards give you a single view across all locations.
Add assets in minutes
New assets plug into existing Edge devices. Adding 5 more motors to a panel takes under an hour. No new infrastructure needed.

Simple installation. Versatile application. Simple handling.

Pfleiderer Group. European panel board manufacturer

See how fast SAM4 deploys

Book a 30-minute walkthrough. We'll show the hardware, the install process, and results from sites like yours.

Request a Demo

Monitoring the assets your sensors can't reach.
